items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Johnny Ortiz was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.

items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Romario Smith was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs

· Corporal Smyers, PSP Stonington, joined Troopers Abhaisingh and Myers to visit a new junior Trooper. Giovani, a fifth grader at a local school, dressed up as a Trooper for career day. CPL Smyers had him try on a campaign hat to complete the look.

items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Milagros Rivera was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.

items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · May 19 Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Eric Garrison was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs

· May 19 Community Services Officer Trooper Gagliardi presents the Online Gaming Safety and Predators Program. It highlights predator tactics and empowers parents to better protect their children. Contact rogagliard@pa.gov for details or visit http:// bit.ly/CSO-PIO for all programs.

· May 18 Troopers brought Citizens’ Police Academy to Governor Mifflin High School in Berks County. Students learned about the tools and techniques used by PSP, including forensics and collision analysis. They toured the State Police Academy and learned about career opportunities.
